detectors.description: LendingPool.repay(uint256) (src/LendingPool.sol#121-135) ignores return value by borrowToken.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),repayAmount) (src/LendingPool.sol#128)

ConstantProductAMM.swap(address,uint256,uint256) (src/ConstantProductAMM.sol#118-138) ignores return value by inputToken.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amountIn) (src/ConstantProductAMM.sol#126)
LendingPool.deposit(uint256) (src/LendingPool.sol#56-66) ignores return value by collateralToken.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amount) (src/LendingPool.sol#59)
LendingPool.liquidate(address) (src/LendingPool.sol#140-169) ignores return value by borrowToken.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),accruedDebt) (src/LendingPool.sol#156)

ConstantProductAMM.addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256) (src/ConstantProductAMM.sol#51-77) ignores return value by tokenB.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amountB) (src/ConstantProductAMM.sol#56)

ConstantProductAMM.addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256) (src/ConstantProductAMM.sol#51-77) ignores return value by tokenA.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amountA) (src/ConstantProductAMM.sol#55)

PremiumMath.calculatePremium(uint256,uint256,uint256) (src/libraries/PremiumMath.sol#18-38) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- intermediate_calculatePremium_asm_0 = coverageAmount * utilizationRatio / scale_calculatePremium_asm_0 (src/libraries/PremiumMath.sol#35)
	- premium = intermediate_calculatePremium_asm_0 * riskMultiplier / scale_calculatePremium_asm_0 (src/libraries/PremiumMath.sol#36)
detectors.markdown:

	- [premium = intermediate_calculatePremium_asm_0 * riskMultiplier / scale_calculatePremium_asm_0](src/libraries/PremiumMath.sol#L36)

detectors.description:
PremiumMath.calculatePremiumSolidity(uint256,uint256,uint256) (src/libraries/PremiumMath.sol#46-53) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- intermediate = (coverageAmount * utilizationRatio) / 1e18 (src/libraries/PremiumMath.sol#51)
	- premium = (intermediate * riskMultiplier) / 1e18 (src/libraries/PremiumMath.sol#52)
